mapper.insert: insert into store_dish (store_id, dish_id, status, stock, warning_stock, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{storeId}, #{dishId}, #{status}, #{stock}, #{warningStock}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into store_dish (store_id, dish_id, status, stock, warning_stock, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) select #{storeId}, d.id, ifnull(d.status, 1), #{defaultStock}, #{defaultWarningStock}, 0, 0, now(), now() from dish d where (d.dish_scope = 1 or (d.dish_scope is null and d.store_id is null)) or ((d.dish_scope = 2 or (d.dish_scope is null and d.store_id is not null)) and d.store_id = #{storeId}) on duplicate key update update_time = now(), update_user = 0
mapper.select:
select sd.store_id as storeId, s.name as storeName, sd.dish_id as dishId, d.name as dishName, d.status as dishStatus, sd.status as onShelfStatus, sd.stock as stock, sd.warning_stock as warningStock, case when sd.stock <= sd.warning_stock then 1 else 0 end as warning from store_dish sd left join dish d on d.id = sd.dish_id left join store s on s.id = sd.store_id
and sd.store_id = #{storeId}
and d.name like concat('%', #{dishName}, '%')
and sd.stock <= sd.warning_stock
order by case when sd.stock <= sd.warning_stock then 0 else 1 end asc, sd.stock asc, sd.store_id asc, sd.dish_id asc

select sd.store_id as storeId, s.name as storeName, sd.dish_id as dishId, d.name as dishName, d.status as dishStatus, sd.status as onShelfStatus, sd.stock as stock, sd.warning_stock as warningStock, 1 as warning from store_dish sd left join dish d on d.id = sd.dish_id left join store s on s.id = sd.store_id
and sd.stock <= sd.warning_stock
and sd.store_id = #{storeId}
and d.name like concat('%', #{dishName}, '%')
order by sd.stock asc, sd.store_id asc, sd.dish_id asc
